category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an HTML Language Server and templating language library; official GitHub README describes validator, formatter, LSP, and templating functionality.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use SuperHTML; source_facts.name is superhtml.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/kristoff-it/superhtml; per instruction not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official SuperHTML README covers editor support, validation, formatting, LSP, and templating library notes.
